briefdescription.para: Microblaze MSR Break In Progress bit mask.
PmcIroFreq variable stores the frequency of the PMC IRO in Hz.
It initializes the Programmable Interval Timer.

parameterdescription.para: is PIT timer number to be initialized
is the reset value of timer when started.

inbodydescription.para: Set a reset value for the Programmable Interval Timers such that they will expire earlier than letting them roll over from 0, the reset value is loaded into the Programmable Interval Timers when they are started.

memberdef.argsstring: (u64 TCur, u64 TStart, u32 IroFreq, XPlmi_PerfTime *PerfTime)
memberdef.name: XPlmi_GetPerfTime

briefdescription.para: This function prints the total time taken between two points for performance measurement.

parameterdescription.para: is the frequency at which PMC IRO is running
is the pointer to variable holding the performance time

briefdescription.para: This function provides the pointer to PmcIroFreq variable.
This function is used to read the 64 bit timer value.

detaileddescription.para: It reads from PIT1 and PIT2 and makes it 64 bit.

inbodydescription.para: Pit1 starts at 0 and preload the full value after pit2 expires. So, recasting TPit1 0 value to highest so that u64 comparison works for Tpit1 0 and TPit1 0xfffffffe

briefdescription.para: This function measures the total time taken between two points for performance measurement.

parameterdescription.para: is the variable to hold the time elapsed

briefdescription.para: This function prints the ROM time.
This function prints the PLM time stamp.
It initializes the IO module structures and PIT timers.

listitem.para: XPLMI_ERR_IOMOD_INIT if IOModdule drive lookup fails.
XPLMI_ERR_IOMOD_START if IOModdule drive startup fails.
XPLMI_ERR_SET_PMC_IRO_FREQ if failed to set PMC IRO frequency.
Initialize all the interrupt Handlers to default handler
Initialize the IO Module so that it's ready to use, specify the device ID that is generated in xparameters.h

Initialize and start the timer
Use PIT1 and PIT2 in prescaler mode
Set the Prescaler mode

briefdescription.para: This function connects the interrupt handler of the IO Module to the processor.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if handlers are registered properly.
XPLMI_ERR_IOMOD_CONNECT if IOModule driver fails to establish connection.
Connect a device driver handler that will be called when an interrupt for the device occurs, the device driver handler performs the specific interrupt processing for the device
Register the IO module interrupt handler with the exception table.
Clear Break In Progress to get interrupts

briefdescription.para: This function is default interrupt handler for the device.

parameterdescription.para: is presently the interrupt number that is received.

briefdescription.para: This function will enable the Iomodule interrupt.

parameterdescription.para: Interrupt ID as specified in the xplmi_proc.h

briefdescription.para: This function will disable the Iomodule interrupt.

parameterdescription.para: Interrupt ID as specified in the xplmi_proc.h

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function will clear the Iomodule interrupt.

parameterdescription.para: Interrupt ID as specified in the xplmi_proc.h

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function will register the handler and enable the Iomodule interrupt.

parameterdescription.para: Interrupt ID as specified in the xplmi_hw.h
to be registered for the interrupt

listitem.para: XPLMI_ERR_REGISTER_IOMOD_HANDLER if failed to register the handler.

briefdescription.para: This file contains the processor related code.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 kc 02/07/2019 Initial release 1.01 kc 04/09/2019 Added code to register/enable/disable interrupts sn 07/04/2019 Added support for enabling GIC proxy for sysmon kc 07/16/2019 Added PERF macro to print task times kc 07/16/2019 Added logic to determine the IRO frequency kc 08/01/2019 Added PLM and ROM boot times 1.02 kc 02/10/2020 Updated scheduler to add/remove tasks ma 02/28/2020 Added support for new error actions kc 03/20/2020 Scheduler frequency is increased to 100ms for QEMU bsv 04/04/2020 Code clean up kc 04/23/2020 Added interrupt support for SEU event 1.03 bm 10/14/2020 Code clean up td 10/19/2020 MISRA C Fixes 1.04 td 11/23/2020 MISRA C Rule 10.4 Fixes ma 03/24/2021 Reduced minimum digits of time stamp decimals to 3 skd 03/25/2021 Compilation warning fix bm 04/03/2021 Move task creation out of interrupt context 1.05 td 07/08/2021 Fix doxygen warnings bm 07/12/2021 Updated IRO frequency to 400MHz for MP and HP parts bsv 07/16/2021 Fix doxygen warnings bsv 08/02/2021 Code clean up to reduce size bsv 08/15/2021 Removed unwanted goto statements 1.06 ma 01/17/2022 Move EFUSE defines to xplmi_hw.h file bm 01/27/2022 Fix setup interrupt system logic rama 01/31/2022 Added STL error interrupt register functionality bm 03/16/2022 Fix ROM time calculation 1.07 skd 04/21/2022 Misra-C violation Rule 18.1 fixed 1.08 bm 07/06/2022 Refactor versal and versal_net code 1.09 ng 11/11/2022 Updated doxygen comments bm 01/03/2023 Remove usage of double data type bm 03/11/2023 Set PmcIroFreq as 320MHz by default ng 03/30/2023 Updated algorithm and return values in doxygen comments 1.10 bm 04/28/2023 Use XPlmi_GetRomIroFreq API to get IRO frequency used during ROM ng 06/21/2023 Added support for system device-tree flow ng 01/28/2024 optimized u8 variables ma 03/05/2024 Fixed improper timestamp issue after In-place PLM update ma 09/20/2024 Increase scheduler frequency to 100ms for COSIM 2.4 abh 10/17/2025 Fixed MISRA-C violations
